/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--enable-auto-import "CMakeFiles/test_posix-core.dir/tests/test_fs.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-core.dir/tests/test_io.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-core.dir/tests/test_main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-core.dir/tests/test_misc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-core.dir/tests/test_posix.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-core.dir/tests/test_process.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-core.dir/tests/test_ugid.c.o" -o test_posix-core.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_posix-core.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  libposix-core.a posix-sockets_build/libposix-sockets.a posix-sockets_build/posix-sys-uio_build/libposix-sys-uio.a posix-sockets_build/posix-sys-ioctl_build/libposix-sys-ioctl.a posix-sockets_build/posix-poll_build/libposix-poll.a ../linux-epoll/liblinux-epoll.a
